related_articles.context: Companion humanoid-robotics push this month — Meta's Assured Robot Intelligence acquisition is the AI/OS-side counterpart to Figure's manufacturing-side ramp.
Direct competitor production-ramp claim — Hyundai's 30,000 Atlas/year vs Figure's BotQ 12,000-line ceiling and 100,000/4-year plan.
Prior Figure AI coverage — different beat (political optics) but same company and product line.
